title: Friday Sermon 3 February 1984
description:
Woe to every backbiter, slanderer.

Who amasses wealth and counts it over and over.

He imagines that his wealth will make him immortal.

Nay! He shall surely be surely cast into the "hotamah".

And what should make thee know what the "hotamah" is?

Allah's fire as preserved fuel.

Which will leap suddenly onto the hearts.

It is locked up in outstretched pillars to be used against them.

 ('The Holy Quran.  Al Humazah [The Gossipmonger]: 2 - 10).

Here, God has conveyed the news of a nuclear war.  The details of the ravages of a possible nuclear war are given in this Surah.

When people forget the Divine attribute of forgiveness, many ills are generated. When these ills magnify from the individual level to national and international level, they take on such a horrible shape that these nations invite their annihilation from God. Some of these ills include back biting, slandering, fault-finding, lewdness, secret propaganda, creating hatred and enmity between groups and nations, falsely accusing others, craving for money, haughtiness and having contempt for others.

All these ills are rampant today on an international level. According to this Surah, these developments are inviting the wrath of God. The word Hotamah literally means a small particle, such as an atom. So when that time comes, God's fire will come out of atoms which will burn these nations away. The closing in of this fire in extended columns clearly refers to the typical mushroom clouds coming
out of nuclear blasts.

I asked the congregation to pray that God saves the world from such devastation. Nothing can save he world except the prayers of Ahmadiyya Jamaat.

The Ahmadies are willing to offer any sacrifice to protect and safeguard the Islamic symbols.
